architecture_summary: Harden the existing Agentic Service Harness RepositoryConnection source contract and read-model projection with durable GitHub repository identity, installation presence state, effective read scopes, revocation evidence, last verification timestamp, and reference-only credential binding while preserving read-only Foundation Mode authority.
data_model_changes: Add provider_repository_ref, repository_owner, repository_name, installation_state, permission_scopes, revocation_state, revocation_evidence_ref, and last_verified_at to RepositoryConnection contract records
Add the same durable fields to harness_repository_read_model so the UI-facing read model can render repository connection status without runtime provider calls
Extend durable RepositoryConnection owner_ref_fields with provider repository, installation, credential binding, and revocation evidence refs
Keep credential binding as a ref and secret_values_serialized as false
rollback_plan: Revert the RepositoryConnection schema fields, fixture fields, projection copies, validator checks, tests, and SDLC artifacts; rerun harness contract/read-model validators, schema validation, SDLC validators, and workspace governance preflight.
migration_plan: No runtime migration. This changes contract fixtures and read-model validation only; no persistent provider store, mutation route, dashboard, or adapter execution path is created.
